keywords: which is better prepaid or postpaid
intents.response:
Great question!

Prepaid = Pay upfront each month. No contracts, no credit check. Perfect if you want full control.

Postpaid = Use it now, pay at month end. A bit more flexibility, plus extra perks like device financing.

Both get you the same awesome network.

Which sounds better for you?

How to Activate Your SIM

Got an eSIM?
Check your email for the QR code, scan it, and follow the prompts. Takes 2 minutes.

Got a physical SIM?
1. Pop it in your phone
2. Go to driverxmobile.com/activate
3. Enter the SIM number (on the card)
4. Follow the steps

Need help?
Phone: 800-399-0087
Chat with us: https://www.driverxmobile.com/24-7-driver-support/
